loneSurrogateStringLiteralTypes.tlua(1,7): error TS2322: Type '"\xed\xb0\x80"' is not assignable to type '"\xed\xa0\x80"'.


==== loneSurrogateStringLiteralTypes.tlua (1 errors) ====
    local x: "\uD800" = "\uDC00";
          ~
!!! error TS2322: Type '"\xed\xb0\x80"' is not assignable to type '"\xed\xa0\x80"'.
